name: Guilds of Ravnica

draft.notes: Basic lands are replaced by a guildgate slot (10 guildgate variations). No basic-land slot. If a foil appears it displaces a common and appears after the rare. Common foils appear 1 in every 8 packs. [Refined: guildgate slot (filter: dual_land_common) replaces the basic-land slot; pack totals 15.]

sourceNotes: Large set. Basic lands replaced by five guildgates (two variations each). Theme boosters also documented on page but not modelled. 36 packs per box. Printed in USA and Belgium.
